title: Decivers Dungeons
description: The fantasy RPG you've been thinking about! The same memorable races and classes, just like in Dungeons and Dragons.
body:
## What is Decivers Dungeons?

Decivers Dungeons is an RPG-focused modpack designed for players seeking challenging dungeon exploration and meaningful character progression.  
Explore dangerous dungeons, discover rare loot, and master diverse classes with unique abilities.

The pack emphasizes strategic combat and immersion, avoiding excessive UI distractions or forced guidance.  
Each venture into the depths requires skill, preparation, and careful planning.

## Features

- A variety of RPG classes including Archer, Paladin, Mage, Rogue, and Warrior, each offering distinct playstyles.  
- Diverse dungeons with escalating difficulty, filled with secrets and formidable bosses.  
- Carefully selected mods to enhance combat, exploration, and character growth.  
- Minimalistic UI and no intrusive quest markers—discovery and challenge take center stage.  
- Support for multiple combat styles, including magic, ranged, and melee.

Join the community to share your journey and keep up with ongoing updates.  
Decivers Dungeons offers a focused, atmospheric experience for players who enjoy depth and challenge.
